title: Follow the manifest
prompt: Your lab has three doors (folders) and a long manifest.txt. The very LAST line of the manifest names the right door; inside that door, doorcode.txt holds the flag. Useful commands: ls (look around), cd NAME (step in), cat FILE (read), tail FILE (read the end).

files.contents: The code on the door reads: {{FLAG}}
